---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
page-layout: full
toc: false
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    css: cv-styles.css
    page-layout: full
---

:::::::::::::::::::: cv-container
# Victoria Lücke

**Master Student in Statistical Sciences**\
Bielefeld University

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Education

::::: cv-item
::: cv-left
**M.Sc. Statistical Sciences**\
Bielefeld University, Germany
:::

::: cv-right
10/2025 – Present
:::
:::::

::::: cv-item
::: cv-left
**B.Sc. Economics**\
Paderborn University, Germany
:::

::: cv-right
10/2021 – 09/2025
:::
:::::

::::: cv-item
::: cv-left
**B.Sc. Economics**\
Paderborn University, Germany
:::

::: cv-right
10/2021 – 09/2025
:::
:::::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Professional Experience

::::: cv-item
::: cv-left
**Assistant in the field of Social Media and IT**\
dggö
:::

::: cv-right
10/2025 – Present
:::
:::::

::::: cv-item
::: cv-left
**Research Assistant at the Faculty of Empirical Economics**\
University Paderborn, Germany
:::

::: cv-right
04/2024 – Present
:::
:::::

::::: cv-item
::: cv-left
**Research Assistant at the Faculty of International Accounting**\
University Paderborn, Germany
:::

::: cv-right
09/2024 – 02/2025
:::
:::::

::::: cv-item
::: cv-left
**Project work in the field of accounting**\
PwC, Düsseldorf
:::

::: cv-right
04/2025 – 07/2024
:::
:::::

::::: cv-item
::: cv-left
**Internship (in the field of semiconductor testing)**\
ADVANTEST, Böblingen
:::

::: cv-right
2019
:::
:::::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Skills

**Software:** RStudio, Stata, SPSS, Microsoft Office

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Certifications

**Microsoft Office**\
University Paderborn (2023)

**LaTex**\
University Paderborn (2023)

------------------------------------------------------------------------
